specific_location: Shallow seepage pond adjacent La Plata River along Highway 140 south of Ft. Lewis at mile marker 16 (private property)
description: A medium size dark perching bird with a black eye, dark bill, dark back, long tail, white belly, strong line between belly and black chest. Photo submitted.Behaviors: Quickly moving from tree branches along side pond to pond branch (of partially submerged tree stump) and periodically doing flycatching behavior of chasing black flies and gnats.Call: 2 note high and thin "feeh feeh"Plumage: Adult plumage
